title: Section 62
content: The High Court shall make such rules under this Act as it may from time to time consider expedient, and may from time to time alter and add to the same: Provided that such rules, alterations and additions are consistent with the provisions of this Act and the 1[Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 (5 of 1908)]. All such rules, alteration and additions shall be published in the Official Gazette.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 51 of 2001, s. 31, for Code of Civil Procedure (w.e.f. 3-10-2001).
